name: Blood of Terramorphous
description: Blood of Terramorphous is a legendary Eridian relic from Borderlands 2. It offers the strongest sustained health regeneration available from any relic. The regen scales with item level: 1% at level 50, 1.2% at 61, 1.4% at 72, 1.6% at 80 (OP8), and 1.8% at 90 (OP10). It outperforms Blood of the Seraphs for raw regeneration, even accounting for extra health. It can drop rarely from Terramorphous the Invincible at Terramorphous Peak.
notes: If you collect the other Terramorphous-only items (Teeth of Terramorphous, Breath of Terramorphous, and Hide of Terramorphous), their red text lines combine with this one to form a short poem.

special.description: +1.8% Max-Health Regen/s ...His blood could inspire... - Adds health regeneration.
special.title: His blood could inspire...
